construction.distribution: represented intensionally by effective point-mass or kernel interfaces plus certified tail or summation moduli
construction.queries: finite cylinder probabilities and bounded computable expectations are recovered by coherent rational approximants
construction.conditioning: positive-probability updates are represented with effective numerator and denominator certificates
construction.reasoning_history: belief states, commitments, grounds, dependencies, revisions, and evidential annotations remain distinct and indexed
construction.recovery: one uniform finite-query recovery interface is shared across the admitted source class without exact-sum or future-outcome oracles

reason: The construction proves faithful representation for countable effectively presented stochastic reasoning systems with certified tails, bounded computable queries, and effective positive-probability conditioning. It does not cover arbitrary measures, null-event conditioning, noncomputable kernels, uncertified unbounded observables, or unrestricted infinite horizons.
nonclaims: all stochastic reasoning systems are represented
all probability measures and kernels are computable
conditioning on arbitrary null events is represented
stochastic representation establishes a universal kernel
FARA is necessary minimal or unique
